name: remove_from_power_rail
short_description: Remove power sources from Power Rail
full_help:
remove_from_power_rail

Description: 
Remove power sources from Power Rail

Syntax: 
remove_from_power_rail  [-power_sources <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                        <power_rail>

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-power_sources]  List of power sources to remove. Can be power rails 
                    and/or power supplies
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  <power_rail>      Power rail to remove power sources from

Categories: 
XDC, Floorplan

arguments.description: List of power sources to remove. Can be power rails and/or power supplies
Suspend message limits during command execution
